title: Misteri Bilik Korek Api
overview: After discovering a chamber filled with toys and stacks of matchboxes in the orphanage they recently moved into, Dina and the other orphans continue to experience supernatural disturbances in the house. In addition, the arrival of Luna, a new orphan who is no less mysterious than the orphanage they just moved into.
